description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10 Docker image. Add a pages job (running in the default stage) that caches the node_modules/ directory, then executes the exact commands: npm install hexo-cli -g, npm install, node server/index.js, and hexo deploy. Configure the job to publish the public/ folder as a pages artifact and to run only on the master branch, thereby deploying the site to GitLab Pages.
